title: Goal advisor creates a file-list Goal Packet for material work
query: I want AGI Toy Shop to keep improving its autonomous storefront until the checkout and support workflow are clearly better. How should we use Goal mode?
reference_points: Recommends native Goal or heartbeat only with durable listed files
Names ticket.md, program.md, and progress.md under an inline Files list
Chooses a metric or feedback provider without inventing fake numbers
Defines a drift policy and when to use goal-drift-reviewer
Includes or promises a native /goal prompt with Files, Task, Logging, Metric, and After each turn sections
notes: Protects the combined architecture-plus-prompt responsibility without reducing the skill to template fill-in.

title: Goal advisor chooses heartbeat for delayed loops
query: Run a weekly AGI Toy Shop strategy loop that checks store performance, proposes the highest-ROI next task, and asks me for feedback when needed.
reference_points: Classifies the loop as heartbeat or scheduled continuation rather than an always-active Goal
Uses the same inline Files contract as active Goals
Explains that heartbeat is a trigger, not a separate loop runtime
Includes human feedback as a provider only when useful
Names no-op, blocked, and resume behavior
notes: Tests the Goal versus heartbeat boundary.

title: Goal advisor designs a skill-improvement loop with human feedback
query: I want AGI Toy Shop's social-content skill to keep improving short-form toy launch posts by showing me variants for feedback before we try market tests. How should we use Goal mode?
reference_points: Classifies the work as a skill-improvement Goal loop rather than a separate human-feedback runtime
Requires a Goal Packet with an inline Files list that names ticket.md, program.md, and progress.md
Uses optimize-with-human as the human-feedback optimization preset and defines the feedback artifact shape
Includes a native /goal prompt or prompt plan with Files, Task, Logging, Metric, and After each turn sections
Names drift review or inline drift checks before continuing after feedback
notes: Guards the first intended rollout: content-skill self-improvement with Kenji feedback before market exposure.

title: Goal advisor uses heartbeat for a parent portfolio instead of one giant native Goal
query: I want to run AGI Toy Shop as a five-year portfolio with year, quarter, month, week, and task levels. The parent should keep deciding what to do next after leaf tasks finish. Create the Goal setup.
reference_points: Classifies the request as goal_portfolio or parent portfolio work
Creates or requires a portfolio.md plus ticket.md, program.md, and progress.md
Uses heartbeat or manual resume for the parent portfolio controller
Explains that native Goal is for an uninterrupted time/budget window and heartbeat is for paused or recurring parent work
Defines heartbeat actions such as start_goal, resume_goal, request_feedback, replan, or no_op

title: Goal advisor generates native Goal for the selected timeboxed file set
query: Given this portfolio frontier: W1 has TASK-0001 define offer, TASK-0002 landing page, and TASK-0003 tracking. TASK-0001 is the first eligible child. Write the Goal prompt.
reference_points: Generates or recommends a native /goal prompt with an inline Files list for the selected file set
Uses portfolio files as context only when they are listed and needed
Requires progress.md logging and completion entries for every changed ticket
Says completion should return control to the parent heartbeat
Does not tell the native Goal to expand future portfolio branches

title: Goal advisor handles child completion by updating portfolio and choosing next trigger
query: TASK-0001 finished and wrote its artifact. What should the Goal Portfolio do now?
reference_points: Requires appending a child completion entry to progress.md
Updates the child node in portfolio.md to complete or complete_candidate
Runs or requests proof/review before treating the child as done
Starts or resumes the next eligible sibling when one exists
Runs parent heartbeat or replan when the current frontier is complete

title: Goal advisor logs no-op heartbeat when nothing useful can happen
query: The AGI Toy Shop portfolio is waiting for Kenji's content labels before W2 can be planned. What should the heartbeat do?
reference_points: Chooses no_op or request_feedback instead of inventing unrelated work
Logs the heartbeat/no-op in progress.md
Preserves the current frontier and hold conditions
Does not expand W2 before the required evidence arrives
Does not create hidden automation or Notion sync
notes: Guards waiting behavior for long-running portfolios.
